title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations
description: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Learners cumulatively produce a durable runbook and restartable workflow through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
